title: phyllanthus formosus
intro: Phyllanthus formosus, also known as the Formosa tree or the Taiwan tree, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating liver and kidney diseases, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus formosus are typically made by infusing the leaves or roots in water or alcohol, and are consumed as teas or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
